posts.message:
Fresh flock update from Roswell Family Farm 🦆

We just added 34 new ducks today, bringing our total to 56.

Some are drakes, but even with that, our egg production has already doubled. These ducks must be on a different frequency, because the results have been truly out of this world.

More fresh duck eggs are on the way from our little corner of Dolgeville/Salisbury, NY, and the signal from Area 51 is coming through loud and clear. 🛸

Thanks for following along and for supporting everything we do here on the farm — from duck eggs, chicken, pork, turkey, and beef to all of our meat boxes. We’re grateful for every order and every bit of support you send our way.

#RoswellFamilyFarm #DuckEggs #FarmLife #OutOfThisWorld #Area51 #MohawkValley #UpstateNY #SupportLocal

🦃 Turkeys?! Already?! Yep… and here’s why 👇 🦃
We know… Easter just passed 🌷🐣
BUT around here, the early bird gets the turkey! 😉
Our farm-raised Thanksgiving turkeys sell out every single year — and once they’re gone, they’re gone.
🌱 Raised right here on the farm
🍽️ Perfect centerpiece for your holiday table
📅 Limited availability = first come, first served
If you even think you’ll want one this year…
👉 NOW is the time to reserve
Don’t be the one scrambling in November wishing you grabbed one 😅
📩 Message us to get on the list!
#RoswellFamilyFarm #ThanksgivingTurkey #FarmFresh #ReserveNow #SupportLocal

🌷🐣 Happy Easter from Roswell Family Farm! 🐣🌷
Today we celebrate new life, fresh starts, and the beauty of spring here on the farm 💛
From our family to yours, we hope your day is filled with love, laughter, and maybe a little mud on your boots 😉
The animals are out, the kids are hunting for eggs, and we’re feeling extra grateful for this life we get to live every day.
Thank you for supporting our farm, following along on our journey, and being part of our growing community 🌱
🌼 He is risen — and spring has arrived! 🌼
— The Roswell Family Farm Crew 🐓🐐🐖🦚🦃🦆
